description: Retell AI is a platform for building, deploying, and monitoring AI voice agents for phone calls, web calls, chat, and SMS. It provides tooling for agent creation, telephony, testing, analytics, and related workflow integrations.
summary: Retell AI exposes a Bearer-token REST API plus a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server that supports API-key auth and curated-registry OAuth; docs also publish official Node.js and Python SDK packages built on the same API key auth.
